_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
| Requirement | Scope | Deadline | Gap from Current Baseline |
|---|---|---|---|
| Carrier SmartWay enrollment tracking | Identify which road carriers used on drayage, LTL, and truckload lanes are SmartWay-enrolled. Build a carrier vetting step that flags non-enrolled carriers at booking. | Prior to first annual SmartWay data submission | Unknown without internal carrier data audit. For workspaces without a carrier sustainability attribute database, this is a new data collection requirement. |
| Freight activity data capture by mode and carrier | Annual SmartWay submission requires ton-mile data by carrier and mode. Workspaces without a TMS field or reporting extract that segments freight activity by carrier and mode face a data infrastructure gap. | Prior to first annual submission | Requires assessment against current TMS/operational system capabilities. |
| Staff training on SmartWay tool | At least one internal owner must be trained on the EPA SmartWay tool to run annual submissions. EPA provides training resources through the program. | At enrollment | Assign ownership before enrollment is initiated. |
| Client-facing reporting template | Clients using SmartWay data for their own submissions will need standardized outputs. The workspace should build a repeatable format for delivering SmartWay-derived emissions data to clients. | On first client request | Gap depends on whether any current client reporting process uses SmartWay output; research gap without internal review. |
| Logo and brand compliance | SmartWay logo and brand use rules must be followed in all client-facing materials once enrolled. Assign review responsibility before updating RFP templates, pitch decks, or website copy. | At enrollment confirmation | Low-complexity; assign to marketing lead. |

*Source: EPA SmartWay Program, U.S. Environmental Protection Agency, last updated April 14, 2026. https://www.epa.gov/smartway*

---

*Section 12 (Exemptions and Edge Cases): No content for this section as of April 2026: SmartWay is voluntary; there are no statutory exemptions to assess. Air freight's practical exclusion from SmartWay's carrier enrollment framework is documented in the Threshold Questions section.*

---
